name: Dunia Al-Thaqafa
overview: "Dunia Al-Thaqafa" is a cultural TV program that aired on Egypt’s Channel One for five years starting in 2011. The show explored various aspects of Egyptian and Arab culture, including literature, art, heritage, and social issues, through insightful discussions and special episodes. The program was known for its informative and engaging content, presented by Abeer Abdelwahab and shaped under the creative direction of Osama Samir and Doaa Hassan.
